llmResponse.agenda_changes: No agenda changes announced. The board proceeded in posted order.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Roll call vote, please. Trustee Lawson. Aye. Trustee Marquez. Aye. Vice President DiCilco. Aye. President McAvoy. Aye.
